title: stelis tetramera
intro: Stelis tetramera is a rare and endemic species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis tetramera include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis tetramera can be made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in hot water, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
